title: GOD 1 Litre Odour Neutraliser Gel – Lemon Sherbet Scent. Fast Acting & Long Lasting Air Freshener. Extra Strong Formula. Eliminates Tough Odours in Kitchens, Garages, Utility Rooms & More (2 Pack)
features: LONG-LASTING ODOUR CONTROL GEL – Persistent odours from pets, smoke, cooking or damp air can linger in enclosed rooms, affecting comfort & air quality over time. GOD Gel Genuine Odour Destroyer works continuously by slowly releasing powerful odour-neutralising agents into the air, targeting odour molecules to eliminate them completely, leaving your space cleaner & fresher. The Lemon Sherbet scent delivers a zesty, citrusy lift of fresh lemon that energises the air without overpowering it.

EXTRA STRONG & LONG-LASTING – Unlike most air fresheners, GOD Aerosols & Gels have a high-strength formula that bonds with odour particles, neutralising them instantly & releasing a long-lasting freshness. Formulated with high-load fragrance compounds & advanced odour-destroying technology, it eliminates even the toughest smells at their source—including stubborn pet odours—never just masking them. Its extra-strong formula lasts for hours, keeping your space consistently fresh.

VERSATILE INDOOR APPLICATION – Odour build-up in enclosed spaces like grow tents, garages, cupboards or utility rooms can disrupt airflow & comfort. Genuine Odour Destroyer is suitable for a wide range of indoor environments, delivering consistent & reliable performance whether in high-traffic areas or confined storage zones—without leaving residue or a cloying scent. These odour eliminators are effective even against pet-related odours & formulated to be safe around most hydroponic setups.

HOW TO USE – Using GOD couldn’t be easier. For SPRAY, shake the aerosol well to activate the formula. Spray generously into the air, away from your face, targeting the centre of the room or the problem area. For GEL, simply remove the lid & place the container in the area where odour control is needed. The gel will slowly release its odour-neutralising properties into the air. Intensity can be adjusted by increasing or decreasing the surface area exposed (e.g. by partially opening the lid).

MADE IN THE UK – GOD Genuine Odour Destroyers meet high production standards for safety, quality & performance you can trust. Each product is developed with rigorous attention to detail—delivering consistent, professional-grade results batch after batch. The 750ml AEROSOL is available in 3 scents: Bubblegum, Lemon Sherbet & Allure. The 1L GEL comes in 4 options: Lemon Sherbet, Fresh Linen, Bubblegum & Cherry Bomb—each designed to keep your space smelling clean, crisp & confidently fresh.
description: Tough on Odours, Trusted in High-Demand Spaces Everyday smells—from smoke, pets & cooking to damp air & sweat—can cling to fabrics, settle into surfaces & cycle through ventilation, leaving your home or workspace smelling stale. GOD Odour Destroyers are made to tackle exactly that. Available in both high-powered 750ml aerosols and slow-releasing 1L gels, each formula goes beyond masking—neutralising odour particles at the source for lasting freshness in even the most challenging environments. Extra-Strong Formula That Lasts Standard air fresheners often fade fast or leave heavy residue. GOD’s advanced, high-load odour control blends are trusted by professionals, hydroponic growers & home users alike for their strength, speed & reliability. With scents like crisp Lemon Sherbet, nostalgic Bubblegum & refined Allure or Fresh Linen, each spray or gel keeps your space smelling clean without being overpowering. Choose the Format That Works for You Need fast, room-wide coverage? Choose GOD Blast Aerosols—ideal for immediate freshness in living rooms, bathrooms or enclosed workspaces. Prefer constant background protection? GOD Gels are the perfect hands-free solution for odour-prone areas like cupboards, grow tents, garages or utility rooms. Both are safe, residue-free & effective for long-lasting use. Create a Space That Feels Better to Live In A fresh-smelling environment isn’t just more pleasant—it supports clearer thinking, better mood & a stronger sense of pride in your space. Whether at home or work, eliminating unwanted odours can transform how you feel in a room—making it more inviting for guests, more comfortable for family & more productive for you.
